auth.subtitle: Sign in to start your daily quest.
auth.no_providers: No OAuth providers configured. Please set up at least one provider in your environment variables.
auth.disclaimer: By signing in, you agree that your data is stored on this server.
auth.twofa_login_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to finish signing in.
auth.twofa_err_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
auth.twofa_forced_intro: This Momo instance requires every account to use 2FA. Set up a second factor now to continue.
auth.twofa_forced_codes_ack: I have stored the backup codes safely.
auth.passkey_err_generic: Passkey sign-in failed — please try again.

dashboard.subtitle_quest: Your quest awaits. One task at a time.
dashboard.subtitle_done: Quest complete — you did the thing today.
dashboard.subtitle_empty: Add some tasks and Momo will find your quest.
dashboard.quick_wins_empty: No short tasks yet — add time estimates to your tasks.
dashboard.five_min_cta_count: {count, plural, one {# quick task} other {# quick tasks}}
dashboard.quest_no_quest_hint: Head to Tasks to add your first task — Momo will pick one for you each day.
dashboard.quest_comeback: Come back tomorrow for your next quest.
dashboard.energy_checkin_subtitle: Momo adapts your quest to your energy level.
dashboard.energy_card_swapped: Quest swapped to better match your energy — was: {title}

tasks.page_subtitle_empty: No tasks yet — let's add your first one.
tasks.empty_night_sub: Start fresh tomorrow — you still have time.
tasks.empty_morning_sub: Start your day with your first task.
tasks.empty_afternoon_sub: Add new tasks or enjoy the quiet.
tasks.empty_evening_sub: You got everything done. Take a break.
tasks.empty_latenight_sub: Pick it up tomorrow — good night.
tasks.form_error_interval: Recurrence interval is required for recurring tasks
tasks.form_energy_topic_default_hint: Default from "{topic}": {level} (will be applied on save).
tasks.breakdown_hint: Break this task into smaller, manageable steps. The original will be deleted.
tasks.breakdown_error: Failed to split — please try again
tasks.banner_waits: {count, plural, one {is waiting} other {are waiting}} for you today.

topics.page_subtitle_empty: No topics yet — group your tasks into projects.
topics.empty_hint: Group your tasks into topics like "Tax Return", "Moving", or "Health".
topics.confirm_delete: Delete this topic? Tasks will become standalone.
topics.detail_empty: No tasks in this topic yet. Add your first subtask above.
topics.form_default_energy_hint: New tasks in this topic automatically inherit this energy level.
topics.form_sequential_hint: Only the first still-open task is eligible for the daily quest. Set the order via drag & drop.
topics.detail_sequential_hint: Sequential: the drag & drop order determines which task is eligible as today's quest.

wishlist.page_subtitle: Track the things you want, and spend more consciously.
wishlist.view_empty: Your wishlist is empty. Add something you want!
wishlist.form_help_coins: You must have this many coins before buying this item.
wishlist.form_error_url: URL must be a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)
wishlist.form_error_price: Price must be a valid non-negative number
wishlist.form_error_coins: Coin threshold must be a valid non-negative integer
wishlist.budget_no_budget_hint: Set a budget to track your spending this month.
wishlist.budget_error_invalid: Please enter a valid positive number

settings.page_subtitle: Manage your account preferences and notifications.
settings.notifications_hint: Get a daily quest reminder and streak alerts sent to your device.
settings.channels_hint: Receive notifications via additional services beyond push notifications.
settings.channel_ntfy_hint: Push notifications via ntfy.sh — works on any device with the ntfy app.
settings.ntfy_server_hint: Leave empty to use the public ntfy.sh server.
settings.channel_pushover_hint: Push notifications via Pushover — instant alerts on iOS, Android, and desktop.
settings.pushover_apptoken_hint: Create an application at pushover.net to get a token.
settings.channel_telegram_hint: Push notifications via a Telegram bot — works on every device with Telegram.
settings.telegram_bottoken_hint: Create a bot via @BotFather in Telegram to get a token.
settings.telegram_chatid_hint: Find your Chat ID via @userinfobot in Telegram. Group IDs are negative.
settings.channel_email_hint: Receive notifications by email. Requires SMTP to be configured on the server.
settings.channel_email_unavailable: Email is not configured on this Momo instance.
settings.email_address_hint: Defaults to the address on your Momo account. You can override it here.
settings.language_hint: Choose the language of the user interface.
settings.notif_not_supported: Push notifications are not supported by your browser.
settings.notif_not_configured: Push notifications are not configured on this server. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY and VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY to enable them.
settings.notif_blocked: Notifications are blocked. Open your browser's site settings to allow them.
settings.notif_err_denied: Notification permission denied. Please enable it in your browser settings.
settings.notif_err_not_configured: Push notifications are not configured on this server.
settings.notif_err_no_sw: Service worker not available. Push notifications require a production build (run npm run build && npm start).
settings.notif_test_sent: Test notification sent! Check your device.
settings.quest_settings_hint: Configure how often you can swap your daily quest.
settings.quest_postpone_limit_hint: You can swap the quest at most {limit}× per day.
settings.calendar_feed_hint: Subscribe to your Momo tasks from Google, Apple or Outlook Calendar.
settings.calendar_feed_warning_once: This URL is shown only once. Save it now — you won't be able to view it again, only regenerate it.
settings.calendar_feed_rotate_confirm: The old URL stops working immediately. All existing calendar subscriptions will break and must be re-added. Continue?
settings.calendar_feed_revoke_confirm: The feed will be disabled. All subscribing calendars will lose access. Continue?
settings.calendar_feed_help_google: Google Calendar: "Other calendars" → "+" → "From URL" → paste the URL.
settings.calendar_feed_help_apple: Apple Calendar (macOS): File → "New Calendar Subscription" → paste the URL.
settings.calendar_feed_help_outlook: Outlook: "Add calendar" → "Subscribe from web" → paste the URL.
settings.data_hint: Download a copy of all your personal data (GDPR Art. 15/20).
settings.linked_accounts_hint: Sign in with any connected account. You can link additional OAuth providers to your account.
settings.delete_confirm_text: Are you sure? The following data will be permanently deleted:
settings.delete_err_generic: Failed to delete account — please try again.
settings.profile_image_hint: Click the avatar to upload a picture
settings.profile_err_email_taken: This email address is already in use.
settings.profile_err_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
settings.security_hint: Add an extra layer of security on top of OAuth login by requiring a code from an authenticator app.
settings.twofa_disabled_hint: Not yet set up. With an authenticator app (e.g. Aegis, 2FAS, Google Authenticator) Momo will ask for an extra 6-digit code at login.
settings.twofa_backup_codes_remaining: {count, plural, =0 {No backup codes left — please regenerate} =1 {1 backup code remaining} other {# backup codes remaining}}
settings.twofa_required_by_admin_hint: This Momo instance enforces 2FA for every account. You cannot disable it.
settings.twofa_disable_confirm_label: Enter a current 6-digit code to confirm
settings.twofa_regenerate_confirm_label: Enter a current 6-digit code to confirm
settings.twofa_setup_step1_hint: Open your authenticator app and scan the QR code. You can also enter the key manually.
settings.twofa_setup_step2_hint: Type the first 6-digit code from your app to finish setup.
settings.twofa_new_codes_intro: New backup codes have been generated. Store them safely — the old codes are now invalid.
settings.twofa_backup_codes_warning: Keep these codes safe — e.g. in a password manager or printed. Each code only works once.
settings.twofa_backup_codes_file_header: Momo — 2FA backup codes\nKeep these codes safe. Each code can only be used once.
settings.twofa_err_already_enabled: 2FA is already enabled. Disable it first to set up again.
settings.twofa_err_required_by_admin: The administrator has made 2FA mandatory for all accounts — disabling is not possible.
settings.passkey_empty_hint: No passkeys yet. A passkey lets you sign in without a password using your device's biometrics or PIN.
settings.passkey_delete_confirm: Remove this passkey? Sign-ins from the associated device will stop working.
settings.passkey_err_generic: Something went wrong — please try again.
settings.passkey_err_required_by_admin: This is your only remaining second factor and the administrator has made 2FA mandatory. Register another factor before removing this one.

search.no_results_hint: Try a different search term or clear the filters.

quick.page_subtitle: {count, plural, one {# task waiting} other {# tasks waiting}}
quick.empty_subtitle: Add time estimates to your tasks — the quick ones will show up here.
quick.completed_all: All done! You crushed every quick task.

focus.page_subtitle: Only what matters. One step at a time.
focus.empty_subtitle: No open tasks. Enjoy the calm.
focus.completed_all: All done! Your focus paid off.

landing.story_quote: "Momo could listen like no other person. That was her gift — she compelled people to reclaim their own time."
landing.story_text: Procrastination is not laziness. It means time is being stolen quietly — by fear, by overwhelm, by too many tasks at once. Momo helps you complete just one small task each day. Step by step, without pressure.
landing.feature_quest_desc: Every morning Momo picks one task for you — small enough to start.
landing.feature_gamification_desc: Coins, streaks, levels — real motivation, no empty points.
landing.feature_reminders_desc: Push notifications when you need them — not when you dread them.
landing.meta_description: A task manager for people with procrastination tendencies. One quest a day.

closure.setting_hint: Show a quote or affirmation after completing your daily quest.
closure.quote_0: “Time is life. And life resides in the human heart.” — Michael Ende
closure.quote_1: “Sometimes you have a very long road ahead of you. You start to hurry. You try harder and harder — and yet the road never gets any shorter.” — Michael Ende
closure.quote_2: “Momo could listen in a way that made uncertain or indecisive people suddenly know exactly what they wanted.” — Michael Ende
closure.quote_3: “There is a great yet everyday secret. All people share in it, everyone knows it, but very few ever think about it.” — Michael Ende
closure.quote_4: “Hour-lilies, they are called, because they bloom with every passing hour. But you can only see them when you pay attention.” — Michael Ende
closure.quote_5: “In reality, time always begins right now.” — Michael Ende
closure.quote_6: You took time for yourself today — that counts.
closure.quote_7: One step at a time. That's exactly how it works.
closure.quote_8: It's not the size of the task that matters, but that you started.
closure.quote_9: You accomplished something today that was still open yesterday.
closure.quote_10: Small steps lead to the finish line too.
closure.quote_11: Well done. Tomorrow brings the next step.

review.motivation_great: Strong week! You really crushed it.
review.motivation_ok: Every step counts. You'll do more next week.
review.motivation_zero: New week, new chance. One small step is enough.

habits.page_subtitle: What you actually do, often — every green square is a completion.
habits.empty_body: Create a recurring task, and the moment you check it off once, its year grid shows up here.

templates.picker_subtitle: Start with a curated task list — you can edit everything after importing.

moving.task_8: Hand over the keys of the old flat

taxes.task_5: Fill in the tax return form

fitness.description: A ready-to-go training session with warm-up, workout and cool-down.
